summary: Matched the ground display translation unit by making small control-flow, temporary-variable, and symbol-label adjustments in src/melee/gr/grdisplay.c, then flipping melee/gr/grdisplay.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The decomp.dev report credited two new complete matches: grDisplay_801C5DB0 and grDisplay_801C5B90, with +976 matched code bytes and +1072 linked code bytes for GALE01.
what_changed: In grDisplay_801C5B90, replaced an unconditional HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj->child) with a child temporary plus a null check and HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(child) guard before calling HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub(child).
In grDisplay_801C5DB0, restructured an earlier goto-based skip path into nested conditionals using the inverse comparison HSD_GObj_804D7818->hsd_obj != gp->x18->hsd_obj.
Fixed the OSReport call in grDisplay_801C5DB0 to pass gp->x18 for the "oioi... %08x\n" format string.
Introduced local temporaries HSD_CObj* cobj and HSD_JObj* jobj to avoid repeated macro/function expressions such as GET_COBJ(camgobj) and GET_JOBJ(gobj).
Moved HSD_GObj* fighter to the function's top-level declarations and added u32 unused[14], indicating stack/layout shaping for the target compiler output.
Changed configure.py so Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c") became Object(Matching, "melee/gr/grdisplay.c").
Updated GALE01 symbols for several local string/data labels from lbl_803E0730, lbl_803E073C, lbl_804D4530, lbl_804D4538, and lbl_804D4540 to compiler-style @207, @208, @209, @210, and @260 labels.
smart_moves: Used condition inversion to remove the visible goto while preserving the original early-return behavior needed for matching grDisplay_801C5DB0.
Cached GET_COBJ(camgobj) in a local cobj before comparing it to HSD_CObjGetCurrent(), a common tactic when macro expansion or repeated calls produce different codegen.
Declared jobj as a local before calling grDisplay_801C5B90 rather than passing GET_JOBJ(gobj) inline, likely helping register allocation and instruction ordering.
Inserted an explicit unused stack array in grDisplay_801C5DB0, showing that stack frame size/local layout was part of the matching solution.
Matched grDisplay_801C5B90 by recognizing the target did not call the same matrix setup helper unconditionally; it guarded the child path with dirty-state testing and used HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub.
decomp_lessons: For near-matching functions, try rewriting goto skip patterns as inverted nested conditions; the semantic shape can remain the same while codegen changes enough to match.
Repeated accessor macros like GET_COBJ and GET_JOBJ may need to be split into named locals to reproduce the compiler's register and stack behavior.
When matching functions that traverse HSD_JObj trees, distinguish between HSD_JObjSetupMatrix and HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub and preserve dirty-bit checks; helper choice affects generated code.
Unused local arrays can be legitimate matching artifacts when the target function's stack frame size or local-slot layout does not otherwise line up.
Once every function in a translation unit is matched, remember to update configure.py from NonMatching to Matching so the build system records the unit-level status.

Symbol map cleanup may be part of matching: anonymous/local compiler labels in .data and .sdata should use @NNN-style names when evidence indicates they are local generated labels rather than meaningful globals.
naming_conventions: Ground display functions retain the address-based prefix form grDisplay_801C5B90 and grDisplay_801C5DB0 because no semantic names were introduced in this PR.
Compiler-generated local data/string symbols were renamed from lbl_-address names to @207, @208, @209, @210, and @260 in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Existing project macros and globals are used as-is: GET_GROUND, GET_JOBJ, GET_COBJ, HSD_GObj_804D7818, HSD_GObj_Entities, and Camera_80030A50-style names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Condition inversion: changed equality-plus-goto flow into inequality guarded early-return checks.
Temporary introduction: HSD_CObj* cobj, HSD_JObj* jobj, HSD_JObj* child, and top-level HSD_GObj* fighter altered expression evaluation and local/register allocation.
Stack shaping: added u32 unused[14] in grDisplay_801C5DB0.
Call-shape adjustment: replaced HSD_JObjSetupMatrix(jobj->child) with guarded HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty(child) and HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub(child).
Argument correction: OSReport now receives gp->x18 for the %08x placeholder, matching the expected call signature/codegen.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 matched code improved by +0.03% (+976 bytes), linked code improved by +0.03% (+1072 bytes), and linked data improved by +56 bytes.
decomp.dev bot listed two new full matches in main/melee/gr/grdisplay: grDisplay_801C5DB0 from 99.58% to 100.00% and grDisplay_801C5B90 from 99.85% to 100.00%.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that add unused stack arrays for matching, especially u32 unused[...] in stage or ground code.
Search for grDisplay_801C5DB0 callsites or later semantic renames to replace address-based function names.
Search for other HSD_JObjSetupMatrixSub matching fixes involving HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty guards.
Find PRs that convert lbl_ data labels to @NNN local labels in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Search for other ground display or camera gating functions that compare HSD_CObjGetCurrent() against GET_COBJ(Camera_80030A50()).
